title: Kureha Prepares Hiriluk’s Gift
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on kureha prepares hiriluk’s gift, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Kureha Prepares Hiriluk’s Gift. Luffy defeats Wapol and destroys the symbol of his selfish rule, clearing the way for Drum’s rebirth. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: Listen up, missy. I'm going to leave this room for a while to take care of some business.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: In the inner room over there, you can find my coat,

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: And there won't be anyone standing guard.

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Also, I've finished fixing up your other friend's dislocated back.

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: The rest of you, come with me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I need you to lend me a hand.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So... she wants me to grab her coat, take Sanji, and get out already...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Y-yeah... that's how I heard it too...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I've been running around for a while now

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Let's go be pirates together- EeeeeerR!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Give it up already, Luffy. He's not just gonna show up no matter how much you yell.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: He must not want to be a pirate.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: No, you're wrong! I've already decided to bring him along!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: And that's your opinion, not his!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: It's not that I don't want to go but we

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What D'ya mean it's impossible!? It's super duper fun!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Thankful for you helping us out!

summary: This part highlights kureha prepares hiriluk’s gift and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
